name: plan_task
description: Store a long-term plan or manage a real-time task checklist isolated by session run.

plan.description: Raw text plan to update (optional, backward compatible).

action.description: Action to perform: 'create' a checklist, 'update' progress, or 'get' status.

tasks.description: Ordered task list items (used for 'create' or 'update').

completed_indices.description: Indices of tasks that are completed (0-indexed).

in_progress_indices.description: Indices of tasks currently in progress (0-indexed).
